entities.name: MARKET ACCESS
entities.description: The ability of farm households to reach and utilize food markets to obtain food.

entities.name: DIETARY DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of food groups consumed by farm households, used as an indicator of nutrition.

entities.name: LOW AND MIDDLE INCOME COUNTRIES
entities.description: Countries with low to middle per capita income where smallholder farmers are often undernourished.

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers operating small-scale farms, identified as a significant share of undernourished people in LMICs.

entities.name: FARM PRODUCTION DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of different crops produced on a single farm.

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: A research method used to identify and synthesize findings from multiple original studies across databases.

entities.name: PRIORI CRITERIA
entities.description: Pre-defined criteria used to screen and select articles for a systematic review.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where context-specific findings regarding market access and dietary diversity were observed.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where context-specific findings regarding market access and dietary diversity were observed.

entities.name: DIETARY QUALITY
entities.description: The overall nutritional value and balance of the food consumed by a farm household.

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The broader state of health and dietary intake analyzed through indicators of market access and diets.
